Simorchip MicroSD · DyO T100
DyO T100 · MicroSD Card
Reliably
Boring.
有一種可靠，叫無聊

We're not here to excite you. We're not here to thrill you. We're just here to be reliable — every single time you need us.

我們不打算讓你興奮。我們不打算讓你熱血。我們只是會在你需要的時候，是可靠的

Six promises. Zero drama.
100MB/s IPX7 / IPX8 -5°C ~ 55°C 1.5m Drop IP6X Up to 1TB 3-Year Warranty
Promise 01 — Never gonna give you up
"Never gonna give you up"
從不放棄妳
It Never Lets Go
Of Your Footage.
它從不放開你的畫面。

The one that holds on. 100MB/s read. 30MB/s write. High-quality NAND Flash with ECC error management — every frame you captured stays exactly where you left it. You shoot. It keeps. No negotiation.

那個永遠抓緊的那個。100MB/s 讀取、30MB/s 寫入，高品質 NAND Flash 搭配 ECC 錯誤管理——你拍下的每一格，都在你放它的地方。你按快門，它守著。沒有商量餘地。

0
MB/s Read Speed
30
MB/s
Write
ECC Protected · NAND Flash · UHS-I
Promise 02 — Never gonna let you down
"Never gonna let you down"
從不讓妳失望
It Never Drops
The Moment.
它從不讓那一刻掉下來。

V30. U3. Minimum sustained 30MB/s write — the floor required for 4K UHD to record clean, uninterrupted, every single time. You don't prepare for it to fail. Because it doesn't.

64GB. 128GB. 256GB. 512GB. 1TB. Five capacities for every workflow — from the weekend hiker to the operator who doesn't come home until the drive is full.

V30、U3，最低持續寫入 30MB/s——這是 4K UHD 乾淨不中斷錄影的底線，每一次都是。你從來不需要為它可能失敗而準備。因為它不會。

64GB、128GB、256GB、512GB、1TB。五種容量適合每一種工作流程。

Video Speed Class · Certified
4K UHD
V30 · U3 · Min. 30MB/s sustained write
Clean. Uninterrupted. Every single time.
64
GB
128
GB
256
GB
512
GB
1
TB
Promise 03 — Never gonna run around and desert you
"Never gonna run around and desert you"
從不背叛拋棄妳
It Goes Where
The Warranty Usually Doesn't.
它去那些保固通常不敢去的地方。

Rain. Sand. Minus five degrees. A fall from 1.5 metres onto whatever the ground happens to be. These aren't edge cases — they're Tuesday for the people who actually use a MicroSD card for something that matters.

IPX7/IPX8 waterproof. IP5X/IP6X dustproof. Operating range -5°C to 55°C. Drop-tested to 1.5m. The T100 doesn't ask for ideal conditions. It shows up anyway.

雨水、沙塵、零下五度、從 1.5 公尺摔到不知道是什麼材質的地上。這些不是極端情況——對真的拿 MicroSD 卡做重要事情的人來說，這就是普通的一天。

waterproof
IPX7 / IPX8
1m · 30min+
Rain, splash, submersion.
Keeps writing.
↑ Photo here
cold resistant
-5°C to 55°C
operating
-25°C to 75°C storage.
Still reading.
↑ Photo here
impact resistant
1.5m free-fall
IEC 60068
Dropped. Bounced.
Still there.
↑ Photo here
dustproof
IP5X / IP6X
dust test
Desert. Site. Beach.
No problem.
↑ Photo here
Promise 04 — Never gonna make you cry
"Never gonna make you cry"
從不捨得讓妳哭泣
It Never Lets
The Shot Disappear.
它從不讓那一幕消失。

You know that feeling. You open the folder. The clip isn't there. Wrong format, card error, corrupted — doesn't matter which one it is, they all feel the same. That specific kind of heartbreak has a name, and we refuse to be the reason.

V30 Video Speed Class. 100MB/s read. A 4GB 4K file transferred in under 45 seconds. What you captured, it keeps. We're boring that way.

你知道那種感覺。打開資料夾，畫面不在。那種心碎有個名字，而我們拒絕成為那個原因。你拍到的，它守著。我們就是這麼無聊。

4GB
4K Video
Transferred in under
45 seconds
V30
Video Speed Class · 4K UHD Certified
Promise 05 — Never gonna say goodbye
"Never gonna say goodbye"
永遠都不和妳說再見
It Never Runs Out
Before You Do.
它從不比你先撐不住。

Action cameras. Drones. Smartphones. Dashcams. Tablets. Security cameras. Standard MicroSD slot — no adapters needed, no configurations, no compatibility surprises at 6am before a shoot. And if you need it in an SD slot? The included adapter has you covered.

64GB · 128GB · 256GB · 512GB · 1TB. It doesn't say goodbye. It just keeps going.

運動相機、無人機、智慧型手機、行車記錄器、平板、監控攝影機。不需要轉接，不需要設定。需要 SD 插槽？附贈的轉接器幫你搞定。它不說再見。它只是繼續。

📷
Action Cam
🚁
Drone
📱
Smartphone
🚗
Dashcam
📟
Tablet
🔌
+ SD Adapter
Promise 06 — Never gonna tell a lie and hurt you
"Never gonna tell a lie and hurt you"
永遠不因謊言而傷害了妳
The Spec Sheet
Is The Love Letter.
We Mean Every Word.
規格表就是情書。我們說的每一個字都算數。

No asterisks. No fine print. No "up to" hiding behind a number that only happens under lab conditions at 3am on a Tuesday. RoHS / REACH / CE / FCC certified.

3-Year Limited Warranty — because if we're going to commit, we commit for three years. What's on the box is the whole truth. Boring? Yes. The way we like it.

沒有星號。沒有小字。沒有那種「最高可達」後面藏著只有週二凌晨三點實驗室裡才跑得出來的數字。包裝上寫的，就是全部的真相。無聊嗎？對。我們喜歡這樣。

The Spec Sheet — Our Love Letter

You already knew this was coming.
Reliably Boring.
有一種可靠，叫無聊。
Six Promises. Zero Drama. Reliably Boring.
六個承諾。零戲劇性。有一種可靠，叫無聊。
"Never gonna give you up"It never lets go of your footage.
"Never gonna let you down"It never drops the moment.
"Never gonna run around and desert you"It goes where the warranty usually doesn't.
"Never gonna make you cry"It never lets the shot disappear.
"Never gonna say goodbye"It never runs out before you do.
"Never gonna tell a lie and hurt you"The spec sheet is the love letter.
Specifications
See? Boring.
Here Are The Numbers.
看吧，說過了這裡很無聊。數字在這。
Dimensions15 × 11 × 1 mm
Capacity64GB / 128GB / 256GB / 512GB / 1TB
Bus InterfaceUHS-I
Speed ClassU3
Video Speed ClassV30
App Performance ClassA1
Performance (MB/s)Read up to 100 / Write up to 30
Operating Temperature-5°C ~ 55°C
Storage Temperature-25°C ~ 75°C
WaterproofIPX7 / IPX8 (1m depth · 30min+)
DustproofIP5X / IP6X
Impact ResistanceFree-fall tested to 1.5m (IEC 60068-2-27)
X-ray ProofISO 7816-1 X-ray compliant
Magnetic FieldMagnetic field environment tested
IncludedSD Adapter
CertificateRoHS / REACH / CE / FCC
Product Warranty3-Year Limited Warranty
* All data secured from Simorchip's internal labs under specific testing conditions.
Accurate data may vary depending on the operating environment.
Reliably
Boring.
有一種可靠，叫無聊。
The card that never makes news — because nothing ever goes wrong.
這張卡從不上新聞——因為什麼事都沒發生。
